circuits.description: 皮层-基底节运动回路：皮层起始通过皮层中继投射到皮层下中继，再投射到基底节/丘脑，最终到运动输出；同时皮层起始直接投射到多个运动相关区域。

function_descriptions.cortical_relay: 皮层区域（如运动皮层）接收并整合来自感觉和关联皮层的输入，通过兴奋性投射将运动指令传递至皮层下中继站，如纹状体或脑干，启动运动信号的级联传递。
function_descriptions.subcortical_relay: 位于皮层下的中继核团（如丘脑底核或脑桥核）接收来自皮层的兴奋性输入，并将信号进一步传递至基底节或丘脑，确保运动信息在皮层-基底节回路中高效传导。
function_descriptions.motor_output: 运动皮层或脑干运动核团通过兴奋性投射直接驱动脊髓运动神经元或颅神经核，引发肌肉收缩，实现具体运动行为的执行。
function_descriptions.basal_ganglia_thalamic_relay: 基底节（如苍白球内侧部）经抑制性调控后，通过丘脑（如腹前核/腹外侧核）的兴奋性中继，将处理后的运动信号反馈至皮层，形成闭环调节，优化运动选择和启动。
function_descriptions.motor_command: 前运动皮层或辅助运动区产生初始运动计划，通过兴奋性投射至初级运动皮层，触发运动指令的生成，从而启动自主运动。

circuits.description: The right basal ganglia circuit, including the caudate, putamen, and pallidum, is involved in motor control and learning.

function_descriptions.motor control and learning: The right basal ganglia circuit modulates motor control and learning through its connections with the cortex and thalamus, facilitating the initiation and execution of voluntary movements and procedural learning.

circuits.description: Right basal ganglia circuit including caudate, putamen, pallidum, and thalamus proper, involved in motor control and learning.

function_descriptions.motor control: The right basal ganglia motor circuit modulates motor control by facilitating desired movements and inhibiting competing or unwanted movements through the direct and indirect pathways within the caudate, putamen, pallidum, and thalamus.

circuits.description: Left hemisphere motor circuit including primary motor cortex, somatosensory cortex, basal ganglia (caudate, putamen, pallidum), and thalamus, forming a cortico-basal ganglia-thalamo-cortical loop for voluntary movement control.

function_descriptions.motor control: The left motor control circuit facilitates voluntary movement by integrating motor planning and execution signals through the cortico-basal ganglia-thalamo-cortical loop, primarily exerting an excitatory effect on motor output.

circuits.description: Right hemisphere motor circuit analogous to left, including primary motor cortex, somatosensory cortex, basal ganglia (caudate, putamen, pallidum), and thalamus, involved in execution of voluntary movements.

function_descriptions.motor control: The right motor control circuit, including primary motor cortex, somatosensory cortex, basal ganglia, and thalamus, executes voluntary movements on the left side of the body via excitatory projections to spinal motor neurons.

circuits.description: The left basal ganglia motor circuit involves the caudate, putamen, and pallidum, and is crucial for the regulation of voluntary movement.

function_descriptions.motor control: The left basal ganglia motor circuit facilitates the initiation and execution of voluntary movements by modulating cortical activity through the direct and indirect pathways.

circuits.description: The right precentral gyrus (primary motor cortex) and right postcentral gyrus (primary somatosensory cortex) are adjacent and functionally connected for sensorimotor integration, enabling motor control and somatosensory processing.

function_descriptions.motor control: The right precentral gyrus initiates and coordinates voluntary movements of the left side of the body via corticospinal projections.
function_descriptions.somatosensory processing: The right postcentral gyrus receives and processes tactile, proprioceptive, and nociceptive information from the left side of the body, enabling perception of touch, pressure, pain, and body position.

circuits.description: 左中央前（运动皮质）投射到左尾状核（纹状体），参与基底节运动环路，涉及运动控制和学习的反馈回路。
A circuit involving the left frontal eye field (FEF), precentral gyrus, and precuneus, responsible for saccadic eye movements and spatial attention.
matched_functions: saccadic eye movements and spatial attention

function_descriptions.saccadic eye movements and spatial atten: The left frontal eye field circuit initiates and controls voluntary saccades to contralateral space and allocates spatial attention, with the FEF sending excitatory signals to the brainstem saccade generator and modulating parietal attention networks.

circuits.description: The cerebellar vermis, including lobules I-V, VI-VII, and VIII-X, is involved in motor coordination, eye movement control, and motor learning. This circuit integrates sensory and motor information to fine-tune movements and maintain balance.

function_descriptions.motor coordination: The cerebellar vermis integrates sensory and motor information to fine-tune movements and maintain balance, thereby facilitating smooth and coordinated motor output.
function_descriptions.eye movement: The cerebellar vermis modulates eye movement control, particularly through its involvement in the vestibulo-ocular reflex and smooth pursuit, ensuring accurate visual tracking and gaze stabilization.
function_descriptions.motor learning: The cerebellar vermis facilitates motor learning by adapting motor commands based on sensory feedback, enabling the acquisition and refinement of new motor skills.
function_descriptions.motor coordination and learning: The cerebellar vermis facilitates both motor coordination and learning by integrating sensory and motor information to fine-tune movements and adapt motor programs over time.

circuits.circuit_name: left cerebellum white matter-right cerebellum white matter circuit
circuits.description: Connects left and right cerebellar white matter, facilitating interhemispheric communication for motor coordination and learning.

function_descriptions.motor coordination and learning: Facilitates interhemispheric communication between left and right cerebellar white matter, enhancing synchronization and refinement of motor commands for coordinated movements and procedural learning.

circuits.description: 小脑前叶经丘脑向运动皮质发送纠错信号，形成皮质-脑桥-小脑-丘脑-皮质环路的一部分，参与运动学习与协调。

function_descriptions.motor_error_computation: 比较预期与实际运动状态，产生纠错信号
function_descriptions.cerebellar_output_relay: 传递小脑深部核团轴突至丘脑
function_descriptions.thalamocortical_relay: 受小脑输入驱动，兴奋运动皮质
function_descriptions.motor_adjustment: 根据小脑反馈微调运动指令

circuits.description: 皮层-丘脑运动通路，多个皮层区域投射到丘脑运动核团，再输出到多个运动相关区域，参与运动计划、整合和执行。

function_descriptions.motor_integration: 皮层-丘脑运动通路整合来自多个皮层区域（如运动前区、辅助运动区和初级运动皮层）的运动相关信息，在丘脑运动核团中进行汇聚和协调，形成统一的运动指令。
function_descriptions.motor_execution: 该通路通过丘脑运动核团向运动皮层和脊髓等下游结构输出兴奋性信号，直接触发和调控肌肉收缩，实现具体运动动作的执行。
function_descriptions.motor_planning: 皮层-丘脑运动通路参与运动计划的形成，通过皮层-丘脑-皮层环路对运动序列和策略进行预演和优化，为后续运动执行提供准备。

circuits.description: 从丘脑到多个下游区域的运动输出通路，参与运动计划和执行。

steps.step_name: left thalamus proper to multiple targets

function_descriptions.motor_execution: 丘脑运动通路通过兴奋性输出驱动下游运动神经元和脊髓回路，直接引发和协调肌肉收缩，实现运动指令的执行。
function_descriptions.motor_planning: 丘脑接收来自基底节和小脑的输入，通过兴奋性投射向运动皮层传递规划信号，参与运动序列的组织和准备。

circuits.description: This circuit involves region 59cc54de receiving inputs from multiple cortical areas and projecting to several targets, suggesting a role in motor planning and execution.

function_descriptions.motor_planning: Integrates inputs from multiple cortical areas to formulate motor plans, coordinating preparatory activity for intended movements.
function_descriptions.motor_execution: Executes planned motor commands by projecting to downstream targets, directly initiating and controlling movement.

circuits.description: Efferent fibers from the right cerebellar cortex project through the right cerebellar white matter to coordinate motor movements.

function_descriptions.motor coordination: Efferent fibers from the right cerebellar cortex project through the right cerebellar white matter to coordinate motor movements.

circuits.description: Right cerebellum white matter (efferent fibers) to right thalamus proper, part of cerebellar-thalamocortical pathway for motor coordination.

function_descriptions.motor coordination: The right cerebellar-thalamic motor circuit facilitates the coordination of voluntary movements by transmitting error-correction signals from the cerebellum to the motor cortex via the thalamus, ensuring smooth and accurate motor execution.

circuits.description: R1发出多个投射至R2-R11，可能构成皮层下运动控制回路，参与运动指令的发起和执行。

function_descriptions.motor_command_initiation: R1通过投射至R2-R11，激活皮层下运动回路，发起并执行运动指令。

circuits.description: 从e2c63285发散到多个下游脑区的运动通路，涉及运动命令的执行与调控

function_descriptions.motor_command: 从e2c63285发散到多个下游脑区，执行并调控运动命令，通过兴奋性信号驱动运动输出

circuits.description: 初级运动皮质投射至纹状体，再至苍白球，构成基底节直接通路的一部分，参与运动控制。

function_descriptions.motor_command: 产生并传递运动指令至纹状体
function_descriptions.motor_integration: 接收皮质运动指令，经直接通路抑制苍白球
function_descriptions.motor_output_inhibition: 通过抑制丘脑来易化或抑制运动

circuits.description: R15 receives convergent input from many regions and projects to R12, suggesting R15 is a premotor or motor integration hub that sends output to R12, which may be a motor execution region.

function_descriptions.motor_command: R15 integrates convergent inputs from multiple regions and sends excitatory motor commands to R12, which executes the resulting movement.

circuits.description: This circuit represents a divergent output pathway from an unknown region (R8) to multiple targets including R1, R3, R5, R10, R12, R15, and R17, suggesting a role in motor control and execution.

function_descriptions.motor_command: This circuit transmits excitatory motor commands from region R8 to multiple downstream targets (R1, R3, R5, R10, R12, R15, R17), coordinating the execution of motor programs by activating these regions in a divergent pattern.

circuits.description: 左中央前回作为初级运动皮质，接收来自丘脑、基底节和小脑的输入，并通过皮质脊髓束和皮质延髓束控制对侧肢体的随意运动。

function_descriptions.motor_command: 初级运动皮质产生随意运动信号

circuits.description: 多个皮层区域通过纹状体投射到运动相关区域，构成皮层-基底节运动环路，参与运动控制和执行。

function_descriptions.motor_initiation: 整合来自多个皮层区域的运动计划信号，通过纹状体-苍白球-丘脑通路解除对运动皮层的抑制，从而启动运动指令的输出。
function_descriptions.motor_execution: 通过皮层-基底节环路中直接通路的兴奋性投射，促进运动皮层和脑干运动核团的活动，实现平滑、协调的运动执行。

circuits.description: Left superior parietal (spatial attention) and left supramarginal (somatosensory association) involved in spatial orientation and sensory integration.

function_descriptions.spatial attention and somatosensory inte: Modulates spatial orientation by integrating somatosensory feedback with attentional resources to guide motor planning and body awareness.

circuits.description: 涉及左后中央回（体感）、左中央前回（运动）和左旁中央小叶（下肢运动）的感觉运动整合。

function_descriptions.sensorimotor integration: 整合来自左后中央回的体感信息与左中央前回及左旁中央小叶的运动指令，以协调下肢运动并优化运动执行。

circuits.description: 基于39f707cf作为丘脑枢纽，接收多个皮层输入并投射到多个皮层区域的丘脑-皮层回路，参与感觉运动整合。

function_descriptions.cortical_output: 皮层区域向丘脑和其他下游结构发送指令，执行感觉运动行为所需的信号输出。
function_descriptions.thalamic_relay: 丘脑作为枢纽接收多个皮层输入，整合并重新投射到不同皮层区域，实现感觉运动信息的汇聚与分发。
function_descriptions.thalamocortical_projection: 从丘脑枢纽向多个皮层区域传递感觉和运动信息，驱动皮层活动以协调感觉运动整合。

circuits.description: 左丘脑与左尾状核之间的连接，参与丘脑-纹状体环路，在运动门控中起调节和整合作用。

function_descriptions.thalamostriatal_projection: 丘脑向纹状体发送兴奋性输入
function_descriptions.striatal_integration: 尾状核整合来自丘脑和皮质的输入

circuits.description: 皮层区域15c7a017投射到7616fe06、c6af08a4、16f18e58、e441500a等皮层下区域，构成运动输出通路，参与运动执行与控制。

function_descriptions.motor_output: 皮层区域15c7a017通过投射到7616fe06、c6af08a4、16f18e58、e441500a等皮层下区域，构成运动输出通路，兴奋性调控运动执行与控制。

circuits.description: 皮质-桥脑-小脑-丘脑-皮质运动控制回路：左中央前回→小脑小叶VI-VII→左丘脑本体→左中央前回。

steps.step_name: right putamen to left thalamus proper

function_descriptions.fine_motor_control: 小脑外侧协调肢体运动
function_descriptions.motor_command_generation: 初级运动皮层产生锥体束和皮质桥脑束信号。
function_descriptions.cerebellar_output_to_thalamus: 将小脑处理结果传回大脑
function_descriptions.motor_adjustment: Adjusts motor commands based on cerebellar feedback.
function_descriptions.cerebellar_output: 小脑通过深部核团向丘脑和脑干输出运动校正信号
function_descriptions.cerebellothalamic: 小脑齿状核等向丘脑腹外侧核传递运动协调信号
function_descriptions.corticothalamic: 运动皮层向丘脑发送下行信号以调节运动回路

circuits.description: 该回路从壳核经丘脑腹前核/腹外侧核投射至眶额皮质，参与执行功能、动作选择和运动学习。

function_descriptions.motor_command_selection: 通过抑制苍白球调控丘脑活动
function_descriptions.motor_signal_relay: 接受苍白球抑制，去抑制后兴奋皮质
function_descriptions.convergent_input: 来自壳核的兴奋性投射经丘脑腹前核/腹外侧核汇聚至眶额皮质，整合运动相关信息以支持动作选择和运动学习。

circuits.description: Involves left precentral (motor), postcentral (somatosensory), and paracentral (leg motor/sensory) areas for motor control and somatosensory processing.

function_descriptions.motor control and somatosensory processi: This circuit integrates motor planning with somatosensory feedback to refine movement accuracy and coordination, involving the paracentral lobule for leg motor and sensory functions.

circuits.description: 小脑小叶I-V和VI-VII参与运动协调和精细运动控制，通过与小脑皮层及前额叶、顶叶等区域的连接实现运动计划和协调功能。
从皮层枢纽到运动汇聚区的回路，涉及多个皮层输入，参与运动计划和执行。

steps.step_name: right caudate to right superior temporal
left putamen to right superior temporal
left putamen to right superior temporal

function_descriptions.motor_planning: 协调来自不同皮层区域的运动相关输入，生成精确的运动计划。
function_descriptions.motor_relay: 作为皮层与运动执行结构之间的关键节点，同步多个输入信号。

circuits.description: Efferent fibers from left cerebellar cortex project through left cerebellar white matter to coordinate motor movements.

function_descriptions.motor coordination: Efferent fibers from left cerebellar cortex project through left cerebellar white matter to coordinate motor movements.

circuits.description: Multiple upstream regions project to a thalamic region (00b68f35), which then projects to multiple downstream motor-related regions, forming a loop involved in motor planning and execution.

function_descriptions.motor_input: Excitatory input from upstream motor planning areas to the thalamic region (00b68f35), completing the thalamocortical loop.
function_descriptions.motor_output: Excitatory output from the thalamic region (00b68f35) to additional downstream motor regions, supporting coordinated movement.

circuits.description: Right basal ganglia (caudate, putamen, pallidum) project to right thalamus, which relays to right precentral gyrus (primary motor cortex) to control voluntary movement.

function_descriptions.motor control: The right motor control circuit executes voluntary movement by relaying excitatory signals from the right thalamus to the right precentral gyrus, directly activating corticospinal neurons that drive contralateral (left-sided) muscle contractions.

circuits.description: 前额叶皮层通过脑桥核和小脑等结构影响运动控制

function_descriptions.motor_control: 前额叶皮层通过脑桥核和小脑等结构调控运动执行

circuits.description: The left entorhinal cortex projects divergently to multiple regions including medial orbitofrontal, superior temporal, and anterior cingulate, while the right pars orbitalis receives convergent inputs from various regions and projects to frontal areas, suggesting a role in broadcasting motor commands.

function_descriptions.feedback: Excitatory feedback within motor command broadcasting.
function_descriptions.feedforward: Excitatory feedforward transmission of motor signals.
function_descriptions.output: Excitatory output of motor commands to frontal areas.
function_descriptions.motor_command: Broadcasts motor commands from entorhinal cortex to multiple frontal regions.
function_descriptions.motor_execution: Execution of motor commands via divergent projections.

circuits.description: Connects right paracentral lobule (motor control for lower limbs) and caudal middle frontal gyrus (cognitive control) for motor planning and execution.

function_descriptions.motor control: The circuit supports motor planning by enabling preparatory neural activity in the paracentral lobule, guided by cognitive inputs from the caudal middle frontal gyrus, to sequence lower limb movements.

circuits.description: A closed-loop circuit involving right insula, right rostral anterior cingulate, left lateral orbitofrontal, right nucleus accumbens, right globus pallidus, and left thalamus, integrating interoception, salience detection, value evaluation, reward anticipation, and motor output to modulate emotional and motivational behavior.

function_descriptions.basal_ganglia_output: 苍白球内侧部抑制丘脑，调节通路活性。
function_descriptions.thalamic_relay: 丘脑腹前核和背内侧核将信息传回皮层。

circuits.description: 从右侧中央前回（初级运动皮质）经内囊、脑干至脊髓前角，控制对侧肢体运动

steps.step_name: 皮质脊髓束途经尾状核
皮质脊髓束途经腹间脑

function_descriptions.motor_execution: 从右侧中央前回（初级运动皮质）发出指令，经内囊、脑干至脊髓前角，直接控制对侧肢体肌肉的随意运动
function_descriptions.motor_command: 初级运动皮质控制对侧运动
function_descriptions.motor_control: 壳核在运动选择和启动中起关键作用

circuits.description: Macro-level circuit step from region R22 to region R14, representing the source region in a neural pathway.

steps.step_name: projection to thalamus and basal ganglia

circuits.description: 多个脑区汇聚到枢纽区域进行多感觉整合，然后通过中继区域投射到下游运动目标区域，实现感觉-运动转换。

steps.step_name: 从丘脑输出到皮层和基底节

function_descriptions.output: 将整合后的信号通过中继区域投射到下游运动目标区域，驱动感觉-运动转换和行为执行。

circuits.description: Multiple regions including hippocampus, amygdala, thalamus, and cortical areas project to the right fusiform gyrus, which then sends outputs to insula, middle temporal, and other regions, suggesting a hub for sensory integration and associative processing.

function_descriptions.output_projection: Additional excitatory projections from the right fusiform gyrus to other cortical areas support coordinated motor execution and associative processing.

circuits.description: A complex associative network involving R10 as a hub receiving inputs from multiple regions and projecting widely, with R17 integrating inputs and projecting to output regions, supporting multisensory integration and cognitive control.

function_descriptions.output: Transmits processed signals from R17 to motor and executive regions for behavioral response.

circuits.description: 皮层输入经尾状核中继至梭状回，再投射到多个下游靶区，构成一条从皮层到皮层下结构的通路，参与感觉运动整合。

function_descriptions.subcortical_output: 从梭状回投射到皮层下靶区，执行感觉运动整合后的运动指令。

circuits.description: 多感觉输入汇聚到b4b97d11并投射到多个区域，实现感觉整合与运动输出

function_descriptions.output: 整合后的信号投射到运动相关区域，驱动协调的运动反应

circuits.description: Projection from left pallidum to right pallidum

function_descriptions.motor_command: Excitatory motor command output from the R23_R22_R14 pathway, driving voluntary movement execution.

circuits.description: 右丘脑本体、右尾状核和右苍白球构成基底节-丘脑-皮质运动环路，参与运动启动与控制。

function_descriptions.motor_planning: 接收来自运动皮质的兴奋性输入
function_descriptions.motor_gating: 抑制丘脑，调节运动输出

circuits.description: 初级运动区第5层Betz细胞发出皮质脊髓束至脊髓前角运动神经元

function_descriptions.motor_output: 将运动指令传递至脊髓
function_descriptions.action_planning: 上额叶后部参与运动准备和序列组织，接收前额叶指令。

circuits.description: 多感觉输入汇聚到丘脑，再投射到皮层的丘脑-皮层回路，参与感觉信息的处理和传递。

function_descriptions.cortical_output: 将丘脑-皮层回路处理后的感觉信息传递至运动皮层及相关脑区，驱动运动反应和行为输出。

circuits.description: 该网络包括左脑岛、左鳃盖部和左眶额外侧，参与检测显著刺激并启动注意和执行控制，涉及内感受和认知控制。

function_descriptions.motor_integration: 将显著性信号与运动计划整合，调节运动输出的优先级和时机
function_descriptions.motor_planning: 基于显著性评估制定运动序列的初步方案，协调前额叶与运动皮层
function_descriptions.motor_sequence: 执行已规划的运动序列，确保动作的流畅性和时序准确性

circuits.description: 右半球腹侧视觉通路：初级视觉皮层（楔叶）→外侧枕叶→梭形回→舌回，处理物体识别和面孔知觉。

steps.step_name: 眶额皮层评估奖赏价值

function_descriptions.motor_correction_signal: Provides feed-forward corrections and coordination timing.
function_descriptions.motor_execution: Generates descending motor commands to spinal cord.

circuits.description: Involves right postcentral (primary somatosensory), right inferior parietal, and right superior parietal regions in somatosensory integration and spatial attention.

function_descriptions.somatosensory processing: Facilitates the combination of touch and position sense to support accurate perception of body position and movement.

circuits.description: A multi-hop pathway from cerebellum to postcentral gyrus via cerebellar white matter and cortical regions, suggesting relay of sensory information through a hub.

function_descriptions.cerebellar_output: 小脑通过白质向脑干和丘脑输出

circuits.description: A three-region chain from the left inferior lateral ventricle to the left lingual gyrus to the left thalamus proper, suggesting a serial processing stream involved in multisensory integration and cognitive control.

function_descriptions.output_distribution: Distributes motor-related commands from the thalamus to cortical motor areas for coordinated action.

circuits.description: The dorsal visual stream, also known as the 'where' pathway, processes spatial location and motion. This circuit originates in the left lateral occipital cortex and projects to the left superior parietal lobule, supporting spatial attention and visuomotor guidance.

steps.step_name: 皮质脊髓束途经尾状核
皮质脊髓束途经腹间脑
听觉信息传递至鳃盖部

function_descriptions.motor_relay: 丘脑向运动皮质传递基底节信号
function_descriptions.motor_command_generation: 尾状核接收皮质输入，处理并输出运动相关信号
function_descriptions.sensory_feedback: 丘脑提供感觉运动整合的关键输入

circuits.description: This circuit integrates amygdala-driven emotional salience with orbitofrontal regulation and anterior cingulate conflict monitoring, mediating fear and reward behaviors.

Reciprocal connections between the hippocampus and orbitofrontal cortex form a feedback loop involved in reverberatory activity and gain control, modulating cognitive processes such as memory and decision-making.

function_descriptions.articulation: Excitatory motor output for articulation, potentially gated by hippocampal-orbitofrontal feedback during speech.

circuits.description: Broca区和Wernicke区通过弓状束相连，构成核心语言通路，负责语言产生和理解。
